chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Special Sales Tax Reference Application No.300 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Hearing of case [Priority] 1. For hearing of main case 2. For hearing of CMA No.2445 of 2018 [Stay Application] 06.05.2025 Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, Advocate for Respondent ************ None present on behalf of Applicant nor any intimation received. On the last date of hearing, following Order was passed_ “None present on behalf of the Applicant nor any intimation received. Whereas, perusal of the proposed questions of law reflects that they have already been decided by this Court as well as the Hon’ble Supreme Court; therefore, Counsel for the applicant is directed to come prepared and assist the court on the next date. To come up on 19.12.2024.” Today, nobody is in attendance. Accordingly, this Special Sales Tax Reference Application is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Qurban/PA*
